ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the case data */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases */,
  "daily_new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases on this date */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths */,
  "daily_new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths on this date */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Percentage of cases that require hospitalization */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the population */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, hospital, crowd-sourced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region (in square kilometers) */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density (population per square kilometer) */,
  "health_facilities" INTEGER /* Number of health facilities in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the group (e.g., 0-18, 19-64, 65+) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the age group */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the age group */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case this demographic information belongs to */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region this case is from */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the age group this case belongs to */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the case (e.g., male, female) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the case (e.g., Hispanic, non-Hispanic) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the case */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Vaccination status of the case */,
  "underlying_conditions" TEXT /* Underlying health conditions of the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_demographics_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_demographics_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_demographics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., vaccination, social distancing, mask mandate) */,
  "impact" REAL /* Estimated impact of the intervention */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_interventions" (
  "case_intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case-intervention entry */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case this intervention belongs to */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention this case was subject to */,
  "effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the intervention for the specific case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_interventions_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_interventions_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, administrator) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case this comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made this comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the comment (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_comments_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case this change belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "field_changed" TEXT /* Field that was changed (e.g., total_cases, daily_new_cases) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_changes_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_changes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the data source was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_data_sources" (
  "case_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case-source entry */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case this source belongs to */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source this case came from */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_data_sources_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_data_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case this note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., medical, administrative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_notes_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "case_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first case in the link */,
  "case_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second case in the link */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of link (e.g., household, workplace) */,
  "connection_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the connection (e.g., close contact, occasional contact) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_links_case_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("case_id1") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_links_case_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("case_id2") REFERENCES cases ("case_id")
)
